description: 20 Indonesian Blue-Chip Stocks - Monthly Closing Prices (IDR), Split-Adjusted
source: Yahoo Finance (.JK), IDX historical data, Bloomberg, TradingView
notes: All prices are split-adjusted for consistency across the full period
ICBP: IPO October 2010 - no data before that
ADRO: IPO July 2008 - no data before that
JSMR: IPO November 2007 - no data before that
BBCA: 1:2 split Jul 2021 - Dec 2021 shows post-split price
UNVR: 1:5 split Jan 2020 - prices adjusted from 2020 onwards
